research_updates.highlight: Mock IL analysis: 92% redundancy for top-fee strategy; 85-89% for censorship-only
Redundancy increases 2% per slot delay; minimal change after second slot
Hybrid IL building approach recommended; zero-slot delay strongly preferred
Same-slot ILs post-EPBS possible via early blob propagation (6s deadline)
